translations: Say O My slaves Those who have transgressed against
(of) Allah Indeed Allah forgives the sins
all Indeed He He (is) the Oft-Forgiving the Most Merciful
puzzle.hint: A message of immense hope and a call to never lose faith in divine forgiveness, no matter the sin.
puzzle.arabic: ۞ قُلْ يَـٰعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
puzzle.verseEn: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful."
